stories.title: GBP/USD retreats as BoE hawkish shift meets resilient US Dollar
stories.summary: GBP/USD retreats on Friday, trading around 1.3380 at the time of writing, down 0.39% on the day, after Thursday’s strong rally following the Bank of England (BoE) decision.

stories.title: USD/INR surges above 94 as INR plummets amid consistent foreign outflows
stories.summary: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its downfall against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday after a holiday the previous day.

stories.title: US Dollar: Upside risk persists in energy shock – BBH
stories.summary: Brown Brothers Harriman’s Elias Haddad notes that recent political comments briefly steadied risk sentiment, but renewed risk aversion has lifted the Dollar, Oil and bond yields while pressuring equities. With no key data due, focus is on Fed speakers.

stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD sets for third straight negative weekly close
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) trades in a tight range around $72.80 during the European trading session on Friday. The white metal holds onto Thursday’s recovery move, which was driven by weakness in the US Dollar (USD).

stories.title: ECB's Makhlouf: Don't think ECB has a tightening bias
stories.summary: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker and Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland Gabriel Makhlouf stated during European trading hours on Friday that the central bank doesn’t have a pre-determined rate path and the decision would be made meeting by meeting.

stories.title: EUR/USD: Conflict keeps downside risks in play – MUFG
stories.summary: According to MUFG’s Derek Halpenny, the ECB’s communication and achievement of its price stability goal leave it in a relatively better position than the BoE, but he is sceptical that higher front-end Euro yields will sustain Euro strength.

stories.title: Silver price today: Silver rises, according to FXStreet data
stories.summary: Silver prices (XAG/USD) rose on Friday, according to FXStreet data. Silver trades at $73.17 per troy ounce, up 0.45% from the $72.84 it cost on Thursday.

stories.title: Scope for Dollar to extend gains further – MUFG
stories.summary: MUFG’s Derek Halpenny notes that the recent retracement in Brent has eased immediate upward pressure on the Dollar, but he doubts the move will last given ongoing Middle East tensions and constrained supply.

stories.title: GBP/USD: BoE hawkish tilt underpins Pound – ING
stories.summary: ING’s Francesco Pesole notes that the Bank of England surprised markets with a unanimous hold and strong guidance that it is ready to act against any inflation spike. Markets added substantial tightening by year-end, though ING views this as too aggressive.

stories.title: Eurozone: ECB caution and hawkish risk – DBS
stories.summary: DBS Group Research economist Radhika Rao notes that the ECB kept rates unchanged but highlighted spillover risks from geopolitical tensions, with updated projections showing higher Eurozone inflation and weaker growth.

stories.title: GBP: BoE repricing lifts Pound but risks loom – MUFG
stories.summary: MUFG’s Derek Halpenny highlights that the Bank of England’s unanimous hold and sharp front-end repricing have driven a notable rise in UK yields, supporting the Pound.

stories.title: EUR/USD: April hike risk supports Euro – ING
stories.summary: ING’s Francesco Pesole highlights that the ECB’s cautious tone masks a hawkish shift, with officials reportedly considering an April rate hike if inflation overshoots. Markets now price earlier tightening and higher odds of back-to-back moves.

stories.title: Brent: Conflict keeps upside risk in focus – MUFG
stories.summary: Derek Halpenny at MUFG underlines that Brent’s sharp pullback from near USD 120 to below USD 105 has been driven by hopes of conflict de-escalation, but he questions its durability.

stories.title: Dollar: Fed lagging ECB and BoE – ING
stories.summary: ING strategists Francesco Pesole, Frantisek Taborsky and Chris Turner note that the Dollar has weakened as hawkish shifts by the ECB and BoE overshadow Jerome Powell’s recent comments.

stories.title: ECB’s Muller: Inflation will probably be a bit higher
stories.summary: During European trading hours, ECB officials: François Villeroy de Galhau and Madis Muller delivers remarks on inflation and geopolitical uncertainty.

stories.title: Forex Today: Major pairs stabilize as markets assess central bank policy outlooks
stories.summary: Here is what you need to know on Friday, March 20:

stories.title: ECB's Nagel: Central Bank would need April hike if price outlook sours
stories.summary: There have been remarks from several European Central Bank (ECB) officials during the European trading session on Friday regarding the current state and outlook on inflation and interest rates.

stories.title: Canadian Dollar outperforms its peers despite oil prices cool down
stories.summary: The Canadian Dollar (CAD) outperforms its major currency peers, but trades flat against the US Dollar (USD) at around 1.3740 during the European trading session on Friday.

stories.title: Gold rebounds as Middle East tensions boost safe-haven demand, inflation concerns linger
stories.summary: Gold price (XAU/USD) rebounds to near $4670, snapping the seven-day losing streak during the early European session on Friday. The precious metal edges higher as the ongoing US-Iran conflict spikes demand for safe-haven assets. Traders will closely monitor the situation in the Mi

stories.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: Posts modest gain to near 0.7100, neutral RSI signals consolidation
stories.summary: The AUD/USD pair trades with mild gains around 0.7090 during the early European session on Friday. The Australian Dollar (AUD) edges higher against the Greenback, following the hawkish stance from the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA).

stories.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
stories.summary: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.

stories.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
stories.summary: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.

stories.title: Bitcoin vs gold shows potential bottom signals as BTC bulls defend $70K
stories.summary: Technical indicators hint at a possible reversal in BTC’s relative performance, as traders watch whether key support levels can hold.

stories.title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
stories.summary: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are revealed.

stories.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
stories.summary: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

stories.title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
stories.summary: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric business model” after its IPO.

stories.title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
stories.summary: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports-related contracts.

stories.title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
stories.summary: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.

stories.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
stories.summary: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

stories.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
stories.summary: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.
